name: Awakened Shrub
summary: A small bush animated by magic, swaying and lashing with its branches. Weak but surprising.

name: Baboon
summary: A small aggressive primate that fights in packs, biting and clawing.

name: Badger
summary: A small burrowing mammal with a keen nose and a nasty bite when cornered.

name: Bat
summary: A tiny flying mammal that navigates by echolocation in total darkness.

name: Cat
summary: A small domesticated feline, stealthy and quick with sharp claws.

name: Commoner
summary: An ordinary unarmed civilian — a farmer, merchant, or townsperson with a club.

name: Crab
summary: A tiny amphibious crustacean with a single pinching claw.

name: Deer
summary: A gentle grazing herbivore that flees from danger.

name: Eagle
summary: A keen-eyed bird of prey that dives with sharp talons.

name: Frog
summary: A tiny amphibious creature, harmless and unremarkable.

name: Giant Fire Beetle
summary: A dog-sized beetle with glowing glands that shed dim light.

name: Giant Fly
summary: An oversized buzzing insect, large enough to serve as a mount.

name: Goat
summary: A sure-footed herd animal that charges with its horns.

name: Hawk
summary: A small raptor with keen eyesight, used as a hunting companion.

name: Homunculus
summary: A tiny winged construct created by a wizard to serve as a loyal familiar.

name: Hyena
summary: A scavenging pack predator with a powerful bite and cackling cry.

name: Jackal
summary: A small canine scavenger that hunts in packs across deserts and plains.

name: Lemure
summary: A wretched blob of molten flesh — the lowest form of devil, mindless and pathetic.

name: Lizard
summary: A tiny reptile, harmless and common in warm climates.

name: Octopus
summary: A small aquatic mollusk that squirts ink and grapples with tentacles.

name: Owl
summary: A silent nocturnal raptor with exceptional hearing and darkvision.

name: Quipper
summary: A tiny carnivorous fish with razor-sharp teeth, dangerous only in swarms.

name: Rat
summary: A tiny rodent, individually harmless but a disease carrier in large numbers.

name: Raven
summary: A clever black bird capable of mimicking simple sounds.

name: Scorpion
summary: A tiny arachnid with a venomous stinger on its tail.

name: Sea Horse
summary: A tiny aquatic creature, fragile and ornamental.

name: Shrieker
summary: A fungus that screams when disturbed, alerting nearby creatures.

name: Spider
summary: A tiny web-spinning arachnid with a mild venomous bite.

name: Vulture
summary: A carrion-eating bird that circles overhead waiting for prey to weaken.

name: Weasel
summary: A tiny, quick predator with keen hearing and smell.

name: Bandit
summary: A common highway robber in leather armor, armed with a scimitar and light crossbow.

name: Blood Hawk
summary: An aggressive bird of prey that attacks in flocks, drawn to the scent of blood.

name: Camel
summary: A large domesticated desert mount, hardy and bad-tempered.

name: Cultist
summary: A fanatical worshiper in leather armor wielding a scimitar, devoted to dark powers.

name: Flying Snake
summary: A tiny winged serpent with a venomous bite that glides through jungle canopies.

name: Giant Crab
summary: An oversized crustacean with powerful crushing pincers, found on beaches and reefs.

name: Giant Rat
summary: A dog-sized rat with a vicious bite, common in sewers and dungeons.

name: Giant Rat (Diseased)
summary: A filthy oversized rat carrying a weakening disease in its bite.

name: Giant Weasel
summary: A large, swift predator with keen senses, used as a mount by small folk.

name: Guard
summary: A trained city watchman in chain shirt with shield and spear.

name: Kobold
summary: A small reptilian humanoid that fights dirty with daggers and slings, relying on pack tactics.

name: Mastiff
summary: A large trained guard dog with a powerful bite.

name: Merfolk
summary: An aquatic humanoid with a fish tail, armed with a trident, dwelling in undersea communities.

name: Mule
summary: A sturdy domesticated pack animal, strong but slow.

name: Noble
summary: A wealthy aristocrat in a breastplate, carrying a rapier and skilled at parrying.

name: Poisonous Snake
summary: A tiny venomous serpent with a dangerous bite.

name: Pony
summary: A small riding horse suitable for halflings and children.

name: Stirge
summary: A tiny blood-drinking insectoid that latches onto victims and drains their life.

name: Tribal Warrior
summary: A primitive hunter in hide armor with a spear, fighting alongside packmates.

name: Acolyte
summary: A junior temple priest with minor divine magic — healing and sacred flame.

name: Axe Beak
summary: A large flightless predatory bird with a massive sharp beak, aggressive and territorial.

name: Blink Dog
summary: A fey canine that teleports short distances, intelligent and fiercely loyal.

name: Boar
summary: A stocky wild pig that charges recklessly, fighting with relentless fury.

name: Constrictor Snake
summary: A large snake that coils around prey and crushes it to death.

name: Draft Horse
summary: A large workhorse bred for pulling heavy loads.

name: Dretch
summary: A small, wretched demon — stupid, cowardly, and stinking of filth.

name: Drow
summary: A dark elf warrior with innate shadow magic, armed with shortsword and hand crossbow.

name: Elk
summary: A large antlered herbivore that charges with its horns when threatened.

name: Flying Sword
summary: An animated blade that hovers and slashes on its own, guided by magic.

name: Giant Badger
summary: An oversized burrowing predator with a vicious multiattack of bite and claws.

name: Giant Bat
summary: A large cave-dwelling bat with echolocation and a nasty bite.

name: Giant Centipede
summary: A small venomous arthropod that crawls on walls and ceilings.

name: Giant Frog
summary: An oversized amphibian that swallows small prey whole with its sticky tongue.

name: Giant Lizard
summary: A large reptile used as a mount, able to climb walls and ceilings.

name: Giant Owl
summary: A huge intelligent owl that can speak and serves as a messenger of the fey.

name: Giant Poisonous Snake
summary: A large venomous serpent with a deadly bite.

name: Giant Wolf Spider
summary: A large hunting spider that crawls on walls and delivers a paralyzing bite.

name: Goblin
summary: A small, cunning humanoid in leather armor with a scimitar and shortbow. Nimble and evasive.

name: Grimlock
summary: A blind, muscular subterranean humanoid that hunts by sound and smell.

name: Panther
summary: A sleek big cat that pounces from hiding with teeth and claws.

name: Pseudodragon
summary: A tiny, cat-sized dragon with a venomous stinger tail, often a wizard's familiar.

name: Riding Horse
summary: A trained mount, fast and obedient.

name: Skeleton
summary: An animated human skeleton wielding a shortsword and shortbow — mindless undead fodder.

name: Sprite
summary: A tiny winged fey that fights with a miniature sword and bow, able to detect evil.

name: Steam Mephit
summary: A small elemental creature of steam and heat that can cast blur and breathe scalding mist.

name: Swarm of Bats
summary: A cloud of hundreds of bats filling the air with leathery wings and tiny bites.

name: Swarm of Rats
summary: A writhing carpet of rats that overwhelm prey through sheer numbers.

name: Swarm of Ravens
summary: A flock of aggressive black birds that peck and claw in unison.

name: Violet Fungus
summary: A rotting purple mushroom that lashes out with necrotic tendrils at nearby creatures.

name: Wolf
summary: A pack predator that knocks prey prone and tears at them alongside allies.

name: Zombie
summary: A shambling undead corpse, slow but tough, that claws at the living.

name: Ape
summary: A muscular primate that hurls rocks and pounds with its fists.

name: Black Bear
summary: A stocky forest bear that bites and claws when provoked.

name: Cockatrice
summary: A small rooster-lizard hybrid whose bite can turn flesh to stone.

name: Crocodile
summary: A large aquatic reptile that lurks in shallow water and death-rolls its prey.

name: Darkmantle
summary: A cave-dwelling creature that drops from ceilings, engulfing heads in magical darkness.

name: Deep Gnome
summary: A stealthy subterranean gnome in chain armor with war pick and innate stone magic.

name: Dust Mephit
summary: A small elemental of choking dust that can cast sleep and exhale blinding clouds.

name: Giant Goat
summary: An oversized mountain goat that charges with devastating horns.

name: Giant Sea Horse
summary: A large aquatic mount with a ramming charge attack.

name: Giant Wasp
summary: An oversized stinging insect with a paralyzing venomous sting.

name: Gnoll
summary: A savage hyena-headed humanoid raider in hide armor with spear and longbow.

name: Gray Ooze
summary: A puddle of living acid that corrodes metal and dissolves flesh on contact.

name: Hobgoblin
summary: A disciplined goblinoid soldier in chain mail with longsword, longbow, and shield.

name: Ice Mephit
summary: A small elemental of ice that breathes freezing cones and casts fog cloud.

name: Lizardfolk
summary: A reptilian tribal warrior with a bite, club, javelin, and spiked shield.

name: Magma Mephit
summary: A small elemental of molten rock that breathes fire and casts heat metal.

name: Magmin
summary: A small living ember that ignites everything it touches and explodes when killed.

name: Orc
summary: A brutal, aggressive humanoid in hide armor wielding a greataxe. Charges into melee.

name: Reef Shark
summary: A medium ocean predator that attacks in packs when blood is in the water.

name: Rust Monster
summary: An insectoid creature that corrodes and devours metal on contact with its antennae.

name: Sahuagin
summary: A vicious aquatic humanoid with claws, bite, and spear. Frenzied by the scent of blood.

name: Satyr
summary: A mischievous goat-legged fey that fights with ram horns and a shortsword.

name: Scout
summary: A skilled wilderness tracker in leather armor with shortsword and longbow.

name: Shadow
summary: An incorporeal undead that drains strength with its touch, hiding in darkness.

name: Swarm of Beetles
summary: A carpet of thousands of biting beetles that crawl over everything.

name: Swarm of Centipedes
summary: A mass of venomous centipedes that swarm over prey.

name: Swarm of Insects
summary: A buzzing cloud of biting insects that fill the air.

name: Swarm of Spiders
summary: A crawling mass of tiny spiders that overwhelm prey with countless bites.

name: Swarm of Wasps
summary: A furious cloud of stinging wasps that pursue aggressors relentlessly.

name: Thug
summary: A street enforcer in leather armor with a mace and heavy crossbow, using pack tactics.

name: Warhorse
summary: A trained battle mount with hooves and a trampling charge.

name: Warhorse Skeleton
summary: An undead skeletal horse, tireless and fearless in battle.

name: Worg
summary: A large, evil wolf-like predator, intelligent enough to serve as a goblin mount.

name: Animated Armor
summary: A suit of plate armor animated by magic, attacking with its gauntlets on command.

name: Brass Dragon Wyrmling
summary: A young brass dragon, playful and talkative, with a line of fire breath.

name: Brown Bear
summary: A large, powerful forest bear with a vicious multiattack of bite and claws.

name: Bugbear
summary: A large, stealthy goblinoid brute in hide armor with morningstar. Ambushes with devastating surprise attacks.

name: Copper Dragon Wyrmling
summary: A young copper dragon, witty and prankish, with a line of acid breath.

name: Death Dog
summary: A two-headed hound whose bites carry a rotting disease.

name: Dire Wolf
summary: A massive prehistoric wolf that hunts in packs and knocks prey prone.

name: Dryad
summary: A beautiful tree-bound fey that charms intruders and speaks with plants and animals.

name: Duergar
summary: A grim, gray-skinned dwarf in scale mail that can magically enlarge and turn invisible.

name: Ghoul
summary: A hunched, ravenous undead that paralyzes victims with its claws before devouring them.

name: Giant Eagle
summary: A huge intelligent eagle that speaks and fights with beak and talons.

name: Giant Hyena
summary: An oversized hyena with a bone-crushing bite that fights with pack fury.

name: Giant Octopus
summary: A large tentacled sea predator that grapples prey and blinds with ink.

name: Giant Spider
summary: A large web-spinning predator with a venomous bite and wall-climbing ability.

name: Giant Toad
summary: An oversized amphibian that swallows prey whole.

name: Giant Vulture
summary: A huge carrion bird, intelligent enough to understand speech and coordinate attacks.

name: Harpy
summary: A winged humanoid with a magically alluring song that lures victims to their death.

name: Hippogriff
summary: A majestic flying beast with the head of an eagle and body of a horse.

name: Imp
summary: A tiny devil that shapeshifts into a rat, raven, or spider. Venomous sting and invisibility.

name: Lion
summary: A powerful big cat that pounces on prey and tears with teeth and claws.

name: Quasit
summary: A tiny chaotic demon familiar that shapeshifts and attacks with venomous claws.

name: Specter
summary: A translucent undead spirit that drains life force with its touch.

name: Spy
summary: A cunning infiltrator with a shortsword and hand crossbow, skilled in deception and stealth.

name: Swarm of Quippers
summary: A churning school of razor-toothed fish that strips flesh in seconds.

name: Tiger
summary: A large, stealthy jungle predator that pounces and mauls with claws and fangs.

name: Ankheg
summary: A giant burrowing insect that erupts from the ground and sprays acid.

name: Awakened Tree
summary: A massive tree animated by magic that slams with its branches.

name: Azer
summary: A dwarf-like elemental of living bronze and fire, wielding a heated warhammer.

name: Bandit Captain
summary: A cunning outlaw leader in studded leather, fighting with scimitar and dagger. Commands through charisma and combat skill.

name: Berserker
summary: A frenzied warrior in hide armor swinging a greataxe with reckless abandon.

name: Black Dragon Wyrmling
summary: A young black dragon, cruel and sadistic, with a line of acid breath.

name: Bronze Dragon Wyrmling
summary: A young bronze dragon, curious and honorable, with a line of lightning breath.

name: Centaur
summary: A half-human, half-horse warrior that charges with hooves and strikes with pike and longbow.

name: Cult Fanatic
summary: A zealous cult leader in leather armor with dagger, wielding divine magic to inspire and smite.

name: Druid
summary: A nature priest wielding a quarterstaff and a wide array of druidic spells.

name: Ettercap
summary: A hunched, spider-like humanoid that spins webs and ambushes with poisonous claws.

name: Gargoyle
summary: A winged stone predator that lurks motionless on buildings before diving to attack with claws and bite.

name: Gelatinous Cube
summary: A transparent 10-foot cube of living acid that engulfs and dissolves anything in its path.

name: Ghast
summary: A more powerful ghoul that emits a nauseating stench and paralyzes with its claws.

name: Giant Boar
summary: A massive wild pig that charges relentlessly, fighting through mortal wounds.

name: Giant Constrictor Snake
summary: A huge snake that coils around and crushes large prey.

name: Giant Elk
summary: A majestic, enormous elk revered by forest folk, with a devastating antler charge.

name: Gibbering Mouther
summary: A writhing blob covered in babbling mouths and eyes that warps the ground around it.

name: Green Dragon Wyrmling
summary: A young green dragon, manipulative and cunning, with a cone of poison breath.

name: Grick
summary: A worm-like ambush predator with rubbery flesh and a beak surrounded by tentacles.

name: Griffon
summary: A fierce flying predator with an eagle's head and a lion's body, fiercely territorial.

name: Hunter Shark
summary: A large aggressive ocean predator with a frenzy for blood.

name: Merrow
summary: A corrupted aquatic ogre with a harpoon and devastating claws.

name: Mimic
summary: A shapeshifter that disguises itself as a chest or door, grappling prey with adhesive pseudopods.

name: Minotaur Skeleton
summary: An undead skeletal minotaur that charges and gores with its horns.

name: Ochre Jelly
summary: A large blob of corrosive ooze that splits in two when struck by lightning or slashing.

name: Ogre
summary: A dim-witted, hulking brute that smashes with a greatclub and hurls javelins.

name: Ogre Zombie
summary: An undead ogre, even more mindless than in life, but nearly impossible to drop.

name: Pegasus
summary: A celestial winged horse, noble and loyal, serving only the pure-hearted.

name: Plesiosaurus
summary: A large aquatic dinosaur with a long neck and powerful bite.

name: Polar Bear
summary: A large arctic predator with a vicious multiattack of bite and claws.

name: Priest
summary: A temple cleric in chain shirt with mace and a deep repertoire of divine magic.

name: Rhinoceros
summary: A massive thick-skinned beast that charges with a devastating horn.

name: Rug of Smothering
summary: An animated carpet that wraps around victims, smothering and blinding them.

name: Saber-Toothed Tiger
summary: A large prehistoric cat with enormous fangs that pounces and mauls.

name: Sea Hag
summary: A hideous aquatic fey whose horrifying appearance can frighten creatures to death.

name: Silver Dragon Wyrmling
summary: A young silver dragon, kind and protective, with a cone of cold breath.

name: Swarm of Poisonous Snakes
summary: A writhing mass of venomous serpents that bite everything nearby.

name: Wererat
summary: A shapeshifting humanoid that transforms into a giant rat, sneaky and disease-carrying.

name: White Dragon Wyrmling
summary: A young white dragon, savage and primal, with a cone of cold breath.

name: Will-o'-Wisp
summary: A glowing orb of light that lures travelers into bogs and feeds on their dying moments.

name: Basilisk
summary: A multi-legged reptile whose gaze turns creatures to stone.

name: Bearded Devil
summary: A spined, bearded fiend wielding a barbed glaive that causes bleeding wounds.

name: Blue Dragon Wyrmling
summary: A young blue dragon, proud and territorial, with a line of lightning breath.

name: Doppelganger
summary: A faceless shapeshifter that reads minds and perfectly imitates any humanoid.

name: Giant Scorpion
summary: A horse-sized scorpion with crushing claws and a paralyzing venomous stinger.

name: Gold Dragon Wyrmling
summary: A young gold dragon, wise and just, with a cone of fire breath.

name: Green Hag
summary: A cunning, illusionist swamp witch who mimics voices and turns invisible.

name: Hell Hound
summary: A fiery, evil hound that breathes cones of fire and tracks by scent.

name: Killer Whale
summary: A huge, intelligent ocean predator that hunts in coordinated pods.

name: Knight
summary: A heavily armored warrior in plate with greatsword and heavy crossbow. Inspires allies with Leadership and parries attacks.

name: Manticore
summary: A winged lion with a human face and a spiked tail that flings volleys of tail spikes.

name: Minotaur
summary: A bull-headed brute that charges through labyrinthine corridors, goring with its horns and chopping with a greataxe.

name: Mummy
summary: A bandage-wrapped undead guardian that spreads a rotting curse with its fists.

name: Nightmare
summary: A fiery demonic horse that flies and gallops between planes, leaving hoofprints of flame.

name: Owlbear
summary: A ferocious hybrid of owl and bear that mauls prey with beak and claws.

name: Phase Spider
summary: A giant spider that shifts between the Ethereal and Material Planes to ambush prey.

name: Veteran
summary: A battle-hardened soldier in splint armor with longsword, shortsword, and heavy crossbow.

name: Werewolf
summary: A shapeshifting humanoid cursed to transform into a savage wolf hybrid under the moon.

name: Wight
summary: An undead warrior in rusted armor that drains life with its sword and raises the slain.

name: Winter Wolf
summary: A huge, intelligent white wolf that breathes cones of freezing cold.

name: Black Pudding
summary: A massive blob of living acid that dissolves metal and flesh, splitting when struck.

name: Chuul
summary: A lobster-like aberration that grapples prey and paralyzes them with face tentacles.

name: Couatl
summary: A radiant feathered serpent — a celestial guardian with healing magic, shapechanging, and divine detection.

name: Elephant
summary: A massive, thick-skinned beast that tramples foes under its enormous feet.

name: Ettin
summary: A two-headed giant, each head arguing with the other. Swings a battleaxe and morningstar.

name: Ghost
summary: A translucent spirit bound to the mortal world, possessing the living and aging them with its horrifying visage.

name: Lamia
summary: A lion-bodied, human-torso'd monstrosity that charms and corrupts with her intoxicating touch.

name: Red Dragon Wyrmling
summary: A young red dragon, aggressive and greedy, with a cone of fire breath.

name: Succubus/Incubus
summary: A shapeshifting fiend that charms and drains life through a deadly kiss.

name: Wereboar
summary: A shapeshifting humanoid that transforms into a savage boar hybrid, charging with tusks.

name: Weretiger
summary: A shapeshifting humanoid that transforms into a tiger hybrid, striking with feline grace.

name: Air Elemental
summary: A living whirlwind that batters foes and can hurl creatures with its vortex.

name: Barbed Devil
summary: A tall fiend covered in sharp barbs that hurl flame and grapple prey painfully.

name: Bulette
summary: A massive armored land predator that burrows underground and leaps to ambush prey.

name: Earth Elemental
summary: A hulking mass of stone and earth that slams foes and glides through solid ground.

name: Fire Elemental
summary: A roaring pillar of flame that ignites everything it touches.

name: Flesh Golem
summary: A stitched-together construct of corpse parts, immune to most magic, that flies into berserk rages.

name: Giant Crocodile
summary: A massive armored reptile that grapples and death-rolls prey in rivers and swamps.

name: Giant Shark
summary: An enormous ocean predator with a frenzy-inducing bite.

name: Gladiator
summary: A champion arena fighter in studded leather with shield and spear. Fights with brutal efficiency, parrying and bashing.

name: Gorgon
summary: An iron-plated bull that breathes petrifying gas, turning victims to stone.

name: Half-Red Dragon Veteran
summary: A battle-scarred soldier with red dragon blood, wielding longsword, shortsword, and fire breath.

name: Hill Giant
summary: A gluttonous, dim-witted giant that hurls boulders and smashes with a greatclub.

name: Night Hag
summary: A fiendish crone that haunts dreams, drains souls with her heartstone, and turns ethereal.

name: Otyugh
summary: A garbage-eating aberration lurking in refuse piles, lashing with diseased tentacles.

name: Roper
summary: A stalactite-like predator that dangles sticky tendrils to snare and reel in prey.

name: Salamander
summary: A serpentine fire elemental wreathed in flames, wielding a heated spear in scorching coils.

name: Shambling Mound
summary: A massive heap of rotting vegetation that engulfs and suffocates prey, absorbing lightning.

name: Triceratops
summary: A massive armored dinosaur with three horns that charges with devastating force.

name: Troll
summary: A lanky, regenerating giant that tears with claws and fangs. Only fire and acid stop its healing.

name: Unicorn
summary: A radiant celestial horse with a healing horn, teleportation, and powerful protective magic.

name: Vampire Spawn
summary: A feral, subservient vampire that grapples prey and drains blood with its bite.

name: Water Elemental
summary: A living wave that engulfs and drowns foes, crashing with tremendous force.

name: Werebear
summary: A shapeshifting humanoid that transforms into a massive bear, typically good-natured and protective.

name: Wraith
summary: A malevolent incorporeal undead that drains life force and creates specters from the slain.

name: Xorn
summary: A three-armed, three-legged earth elemental that burrows through stone and devours gems and metal.

name: Chimera
summary: A three-headed hybrid of dragon, lion, and goat that breathes fire and attacks with all three heads.

name: Drider
summary: A drow cursed into a spider-centaur form, wielding a longbow and innate dark magic.

name: Invisible Stalker
summary: An air elemental bound to servitude, relentlessly tracking targets while permanently invisible.

name: Mage
summary: A scholarly spellcaster wielding a dagger and a vast arsenal of arcane magic including fireball and cone of cold.

name: Mammoth
summary: A colossal woolly elephant that tramples foes beneath its massive feet and tusks.

name: Medusa
summary: A snake-haired humanoid whose gaze turns creatures to stone, wielding a shortsword and longbow.

name: Vrock
summary: A vulture-headed demon that shrieks stunningly and releases clouds of toxic spores.

name: Wyvern
summary: A dragon-like flying predator with a venomous stinger tail but no breath weapon.

name: Young Brass Dragon
summary: A chatty young dragon of the desert that breathes fire and sleep-inducing gas.

name: Young White Dragon
summary: A savage young dragon of the arctic that breathes devastating cones of cold.

name: Giant Ape
summary: A massive primate that hurls boulders and pounds foes with enormous fists.

name: Oni
summary: A shape-shifting ogre mage that flies, turns invisible, and wields a glaive with dark magic.

name: Shield Guardian
summary: A towering construct bound to an amulet-bearer, shielding them and storing spells.

name: Stone Giant
summary: A reclusive mountain giant that hurls boulders with deadly precision and catches them in return.

name: Young Black Dragon
summary: A cruel young dragon of swamps and marshes that breathes a line of dissolving acid.

name: Young Copper Dragon
summary: A playful, riddle-loving young dragon that breathes acid and slowing gas.

name: Assassin
summary: A deadly professional killer in studded leather with shortsword and poisoned crossbow. Strikes from stealth for devastating damage.

name: Chain Devil
summary: A fiend wrapped in animated chains that lash out to grapple and tear at multiple foes.

name: Cloaker
summary: A ray-shaped aberration that wraps around prey like a living cloak, biting and wailing.

name: Frost Giant
summary: A blue-skinned giant of the frozen wastes that hurls boulders and swings a greataxe.

name: Hezrou
summary: A massive, toad-like demon surrounded by nauseating stench, grappling with claws and fangs.

name: Hydra
summary: A multi-headed reptilian beast — cut off one head and two more grow back.

name: Spirit Naga
summary: An immortal serpent spellcaster that reforms days after death, wielding potent arcane and divine magic.

name: Tyrannosaurus Rex
summary: A colossal apex predator with an enormous crushing bite that swallows prey.

name: Young Bronze Dragon
summary: An honorable young dragon of coastlines that breathes lightning and repulsion energy.

name: Young Green Dragon
summary: A manipulative young dragon of forests that breathes a cone of deadly poison.

name: Bone Devil
summary: A skeletal fiend with a scorpion-like poisonous tail and a hooked polearm.

name: Clay Golem
summary: A massive clay construct immune to most magic, whose fists inflict cursed wounds that resist healing.

name: Cloud Giant
summary: A regal giant dwelling in sky castles, hurling boulders and striking with a morningstar.

name: Fire Giant
summary: A militaristic giant of volcanic forges that hurls boulders and smashes with a greatsword.

name: Glabrezu
summary: A towering four-armed demon with massive pincers that tempts mortals with wishes and illusions.

name: Treant
summary: An ancient, enormous walking tree that animates other trees and slams with its branches.

name: Young Blue Dragon
summary: A proud young dragon of deserts that breathes devastating lines of lightning.

name: Young Silver Dragon
summary: A noble young dragon that breathes cold and paralyzing gas, often befriending humanoids.

name: Aboleth
summary: An ancient aquatic aberration with psychic powers that enslaves minds and reshapes flesh.

name: Deva
summary: A celestial angelic warrior with a glowing mace, healing touch, and powerful divine magic.

name: Guardian Naga
summary: A benevolent serpent guardian with potent divine spellcasting that protects sacred sites.

name: Stone Golem
summary: A massive stone construct immune to most magic, whose fists slow victims magically.

name: Young Gold Dragon
summary: A wise young dragon that breathes fire and weakening gas, championing justice.

name: Young Red Dragon
summary: A greedy, aggressive young dragon that breathes devastating cones of fire.

name: Behir
summary: A massive twelve-legged serpentine predator that breathes lightning and swallows prey whole.

name: Djinni
summary: A noble air genie that commands winds, creates illusions, and grants wishes to mortals.

name: Efreeti
summary: A proud fire genie of blazing power that hurls flame and grants twisted wishes.

name: Gynosphinx
summary: A winged lion with a woman's face, posing deadly riddles and wielding time-warping magic.

name: Horned Devil
summary: A winged, horned fiend wielding a barbed chain whip that burns and wounds.

name: Remorhaz
summary: A massive arctic centipede that generates intense internal heat, melting weapons and swallowing prey.

name: Roc
summary: A gargantuan bird of prey large enough to carry elephants, nesting on remote mountaintops.

name: Archmage
summary: A supremely powerful wizard wielding a dagger and mastery of arcane magic up to 9th level, protected by magic resistance.

name: Erinyes
summary: A fallen angel turned devil, flying on black wings and wielding a poisoned longsword and longbow with deadly precision.

name: Adult Brass Dragon
summary: A gregarious desert dragon that breathes fire and sleep-inducing gas, fond of conversation.

name: Adult White Dragon
summary: A savage arctic dragon that breathes devastating cones of cold, the most bestial of chromatics.

name: Nalfeshnee
summary: A grotesque pig-faced demon that flies on undersized wings and blasts foes with unholy light.

name: Rakshasa
summary: A tiger-headed fiend disguised as a noble, immune to low-level magic and wielding powerful illusions.

name: Storm Giant
summary: A towering giant of sea and sky that hurls lightning bolts and wields a greatsword.

name: Vampire
summary: A charismatic undead lord that charms, bites, and drains life, commanding the night with shapeshifting and mist form.

name: Adult Black Dragon
summary: A cruel, scheming dragon of fetid swamps that breathes a devastating line of acid.

name: Adult Copper Dragon
summary: A witty, prankish mountain dragon that breathes acid and slowing gas.

name: Ice Devil
summary: A towering insectoid devil of frozen hells that wields a frigid spear and commands walls of ice.

name: Adult Bronze Dragon
summary: An honorable coastal dragon that breathes lightning and repulsion energy, often aiding mortals.

name: Adult Green Dragon
summary: A cunning, manipulative forest dragon that breathes deadly poison gas and excels at deception.

name: Mummy Lord
summary: An ancient undead pharaoh with devastating divine magic, cursed fists, and legendary resistance.

name: Purple Worm
summary: A gargantuan burrowing worm that swallows prey whole and stings with a venomous tail.

name: Adult Blue Dragon
summary: A proud, territorial desert dragon that breathes devastating lines of lightning and burrows through sand.

name: Adult Silver Dragon
summary: A noble, shapechanging dragon that breathes cold and paralyzing gas, a steadfast ally of humanoids.

name: Iron Golem
summary: A massive iron construct that breathes poison gas and strikes with devastating fists. Nearly indestructible.

name: Marilith
summary: A six-armed serpentine demon wielding six swords simultaneously with terrifying speed and skill.

name: Planetar
summary: A towering angelic warrior with a flaming greatsword, radiant damage, and powerful divine magic.

name: Adult Gold Dragon
summary: A wise, just dragon that breathes fire and weakening gas, often ruling as a benevolent protector.

name: Adult Red Dragon
summary: A greedy, tyrannical dragon — the most powerful and feared of the chromatics, breathing devastating fire.

name: Androsphinx
summary: A winged lion with a man's face whose roar can teleport, frighten, or paralyze. Wields powerful divine magic.

name: Dragon Turtle
summary: A gargantuan armored sea creature with a dragon's head that breathes scalding steam.

name: Balor
summary: The mightiest demon — a towering fiend of flame wielding a lightning whip and longsword, exploding on death.

name: Ancient Brass Dragon
summary: An ancient desert dragon, endlessly talkative and wise, breathing fire and sleep-inducing gas. A legendary creature.

name: Ancient White Dragon
summary: An ancient arctic predator, the most feral of the chromatic dragons. Breathes devastating cones of cold and commands icy terrain.

name: Pit Fiend
summary: The supreme devil general — a towering winged fiend wielding a flaming mace and commanding infernal legions.

name: Ancient Black Dragon
summary: An ancient swamp-dwelling dragon of extreme cruelty, breathing devastating lines of acid.

name: Ancient Copper Dragon
summary: An ancient mountain dragon, a legendary prankster and riddler, breathing acid and slowing gas.

name: Lich
summary: An undead archmage who achieved immortality through a phylactery, wielding devastating arcane magic up to 9th level.

name: Solar
summary: The greatest of angels — a towering celestial warrior with a slaying longbow, flying greatsword, and divine magic.

name: Ancient Bronze Dragon
summary: An ancient coastal dragon of great honor, breathing lightning and repulsion energy. Allies with mortals against evil.

name: Ancient Green Dragon
summary: An ancient forest dragon and master manipulator, breathing deadly poison and spinning centuries-long schemes.

name: Ancient Blue Dragon
summary: An ancient desert dragon of immense pride, breathing devastating lightning and commanding vast territories.

name: Ancient Silver Dragon
summary: An ancient shapechanging dragon that befriends humanoids, breathing cold and paralyzing gas. Among the noblest of dragons.

name: Kraken
summary: A gargantuan tentacled sea god that creates storms, destroys ships, and drags prey into the crushing depths.

name: Ancient Gold Dragon
summary: The wisest and most powerful metallic dragon, breathing fire and weakening gas. A legendary champion of justice.

name: Ancient Red Dragon
summary: The mightiest of all chromatic dragons — a gargantuan tyrant of fire, greed, and destruction.

name: Tarrasque
summary: The ultimate monster — a gargantuan, nearly indestructible engine of destruction that devours everything in its path.
